enrichment.summary: Kyle films a casual morning vlog from his Boulder apartment, addressing a subscriber's comment about his nickname and the hospital-bed look of his videos. He talks about setting up a green screen, having his mom help thin out his closet, working on his personal website project he calls 'Bibles of America,' and planning to buy a window-washing business that he intends to run by bicycle with a trailer.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.topic: running a window washing business by bicycle
stances.position: plans to do it and sees it as revolutionary and the right move for becoming a businessman
needs to finish it before doing anything else; it's a prerequisite to the bike business plan
getting one will make his videos look more professional and fun

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been 43 for a month in 2017.

claims.subject: Tyne Samson
claims.claim: Tyne Samson commented on my last video calling me 'Kyle Piggy Pounds,' which I find funny and accept as a nickname.

claims.subject: YouTube comments
claims.claim: I tried to reply to Tyne Samson's comment, but it failed to post, so I had to delete it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: People say I look like I'm in a hospital bed, including my mom and two others.

claims.subject: green screen
claims.claim: I got a green screen a few days ago and plan to hang it in my bathroom for videos with psychedelic backgrounds and sound effects.

claims.subject: Kyle's mom
claims.claim: My mom is coming over at 10 to help me thin out my closet because I have too many clothing items.

claims.subject: Bibles of America
claims.claim: I was working on 'Bibles of America' (origin stories) but got burned out and switched to audio history books.

claims.subject: website
claims.claim: I need to focus on my website for the next three months (February, March, April) to tie up loose ends before starting my bike-writing project.

claims.subject: business
claims.claim: I plan to buy a business and have my roommate work with me, but I need to make myself likable and irreproachable first.

claims.subject: bicycle business
claims.claim: I want to start a revolutionary small business using a bicycle to haul window-washing equipment, including full-sized ladders.

claims.subject: ladders
claims.claim: I plan to store ladders on my roommate's car or in my living room since my garage is full of kayaks.

claims.subject: YouTube
claims.claim: I'd like to figure out why I can't respond to YouTube comments, but I don't have time for it right now.
